entity.summary: Radix automated market maker and trade-routing venue with current liquidity, staked protocol value, and non-zero recent spot-trading activity.
entity.notes: Current protocol data preserves Astrolescent as a Radix AMM and reports non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day DEX volume together with current liquidity and staked value. HEI therefore classifies it as active. A stable first-party application URL was not promoted in this review pass.

evidence.title: Astrolescent protocol profile
evidence.notes: Current protocol data identifies Astrolescent as a Radix AMM and trade-routing venue.

evidence.title: Astrolescent DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: Non-zero current 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day Radix DEX volume supports an active classification.

evidence.title: Astrolescent protocol data endpoint
evidence.notes: Current liquidity, staked value, and cumulative exchange history reinforce the active status decision.
